title: eurybia divaricata
intro: Eurybia divaricata, also known as Eastern sea rocket, is a perennial plant native to the coastal regions of North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and aromatic leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eurybia divaricata include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe coughs and promote overall well-being.
